assertions.title: Tenant isolation across all cross-module and shared-master surfaces

steps.action: Log in as seeded MOCK and RIVAL tenant admins and list dealer directories on `/api/v1/dealers`
steps.expected: Each tenant sees only its own dealer-master data with no foreign dealer leakage
steps.observed: `validation.admin@example.com` (`MOCK`) received 200 with only `GST-DEALER` and `VALID-DEALER`; `validation.rival.admin@example.com` (`RIVAL`) received 200 with only `RIVAL-DEALER`. No rival dealer code appeared in the MOCK directory response.

steps.action: Probe cross-tenant dealer-master reads and writes from the MOCK tenant using RIVAL dealer id `2`
steps.expected: Foreign-tenant dealer detail and mutation attempts fail closed before any mutation
steps.observed: `GET /api/v1/dealers/2` from MOCK returned 404 `Dealer not found` (`BUS_003`); `POST /api/v1/dealers/2/dunning/hold` returned 400 `Dealer not found` (`VAL_001`).

steps.action: Probe dealer-finance reads on `/api/v1/portal/finance/aging` for own and foreign dealer ids
steps.expected: Own dealer finance read succeeds; foreign dealer finance read is denied or masked
steps.observed: `GET /api/v1/portal/finance/aging?dealerId=1` from MOCK returned 200 for `Validation Dealer`; the same tenant calling `dealerId=2` returned 404 `Dealer not found`. The focused `PortalFinanceControllerIT`, `DealerLedgerIT`, and `StatementAgingIT` suites also passed with zero failures.

steps.action: Probe representative accounting, stock/catalog, and report surfaces under each tenant
steps.expected: Each tenant sees only its own company-scoped data on exposed surfaces
steps.observed: MOCK returned 15 accounts, 14 journal entries, 4 finished goods, and 4 catalog items (`Mock Brand` / `E2E-PAINT-001`, `FG-GST`, `FG-KIT`, `FG-LIFO`); RIVAL returned only its own AR account and empty journal/finished-good/catalog lists. `GET /api/v1/reports/aged-debtors` returned 200 for both tenants with no cross-tenant rows.

steps.action: Attempt a fail-closed cross-tenant accounting write from MOCK using foreign account id `2` in `/api/v1/accounting/journal-entries`
steps.expected: The request is rejected because the foreign account is outside the authenticated tenant scope
steps.observed: The manual journal POST returned 400 `Account not found` (`VAL_006`), confirming the MOCK tenant could not reference the RIVAL AR account in a write path.

evidence.tests: Passing targeted suite summaries saved in `evidence/accounting-boundary-and-tenant-safety/tenant-safety-and-rls/suite-summaries.json` for `PortalFinanceControllerIT`, `DealerLedgerIT`, `StatementAgingIT`, `ReportControllerSecurityIT`, `ReportControllerRouteContractIT`, `SuperAdminTenantWorkflowIsolationIT`, `CompanyContextFilterControlPlaneBindingTest`, `TenantRuntimeEnforcementAuthIT`, `AdminApprovalRbacIT`, and `OpenApiSnapshotIT`.

assertions.title: Database-level RLS enforces tenant isolation across accounting tables

steps.action: Review the canonical accounting RLS table list and policy contract from `AccountingTenantIsolationRlsIT`, then inspect the local compose database flags in `pg_class` / `pg_policies`
steps.expected: Every named accounting truth table has row security enabled, forced row security enabled, and at least one policy
steps.observed: The compose DB inspection showed all 18 named accounting tables with `relrowsecurity=t`, `relforcerowsecurity=t`, and `policy_count=1`, including `accounts`, `journal_entries`, `journal_lines`, `dealer_ledger_entries`, `partner_settlement_allocations`, reconciliation tables, and period-close tables.

steps.action: Use a local probe role on the compose database with no tenant context and with malformed tenant context
steps.expected: Accounting rows are invisible and writes fail closed when tenant context is absent or malformed
steps.observed: `without_context_journal_entries|0` and `bad_context_journal_entries|0` were returned after `SET ROLE erp_rls_probe`; no accounting rows were visible without a valid tenant binding.

steps.action: Bind MOCK tenant context through `set_config('app.current_company_id', 'MOCK', false)` under the probe role and inspect accounting rows
steps.expected: The probe sees only MOCK accounting rows and cannot update foreign-tenant rows
steps.observed: The compose DB probe returned `bound_context|MOCK`, `mock_visible_own_journal_entries|14`, `mock_visible_foreign_journal_entries|0`, `mock_visible_foreign_journal_lines|0`, `mock_visible_foreign_dealer_ledger_rows|0`, `mock_own_update_rows|14`, `mock_foreign_update_rows|0`, and `mock_foreign_ledger_update_rows|0`.

steps.action: Bind RIVAL tenant context through the same probe role
steps.expected: The probe remains scoped to RIVAL and sees no MOCK rows
steps.observed: The compose DB probe returned `rival_bound_context|RIVAL`, `rival_visible_own_journal_entries|0`, and `rival_visible_foreign_journal_entries|0`; the RIVAL context stayed isolated and did not expose MOCK journals.

steps.action: Run the focused app-datasource binding and RLS integration coverage
steps.expected: The canonical suite proves CompanyContextHolder binding plus blocked foreign reads/writes on the application datasource
steps.observed: `AccountingTenantIsolationRlsIT` passed all 3 tests, including the `appDatasourceBinding_appliesCompanyContextHolderAndFailsClosedWhenContextIsMissingOrBad` path that uses `SET ROLE erp_rls_probe`, `current_setting('app.current_company_id', true)`, and blocked foreign write assertions. Related auth-binding suites (`CompanyContextFilterControlPlaneBindingTest`, `TenantRuntimeEnforcementAuthIT`) also passed.

evidence.dbInspect: Compose DB outputs saved in `evidence/accounting-boundary-and-tenant-safety/tenant-safety-and-rls/db-rls-schema.txt` and `.../db-compose-rls-probes.txt`.
evidence.tests: `AccountingTenantIsolationRlsIT` summary recorded in `evidence/accounting-boundary-and-tenant-safety/tenant-safety-and-rls/suite-summaries.json` with `Tests run: 3, Failures: 0, Errors: 0`.

frictions.description: The delegated `user-testing-flow-validator` Task helper exited immediately with no captured assistant output and no JSON report.
frictions.resolution: Fell back to direct in-session validation on the same seeded runtime and documented the fallback in `.factory/library/user-testing.md`.

frictions.description: The seeded runtime does not currently include rival-tenant catalog stock rows beyond dealer/account/accounting fixtures, so catalog/stock proof had to rely on the live tenant-scoped `/api/v1/catalog/items` and `/api/v1/finished-goods` responses plus DB inventory showing only MOCK finished-good rows.
frictions.resolution: Used the existing live catalog and finished-goods surfaces to prove the MOCK tenant saw only MOCK item identities while the RIVAL tenant saw empty scoped lists, and paired that with stronger dealer/accounting/finance cross-tenant proofs.

summary: Tested 2 assertions directly in-session after the delegated flow-validator helper failed to emit a report. `VAL-CROSS-023` passed with live tenant-scoped dealer, finance, accounting, report, and stock/catalog probes that masked or rejected foreign-tenant access. `VAL-CROSS-027` passed with compose DB RLS inspection plus the focused `AccountingTenantIsolationRlsIT` app-datasource binding suite proving fail-closed tenant isolation across the named accounting tables.
